inlineStyles: transform: translate(-50%, -50%); mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at center, black 20%, transparent 60%); -webkit-mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at center, black 20%, transparent 60%);
background: radial-gradient(circle at center, transparent 0%, rgba(14, 20, 26, 0.8) 70%, #0e141a 100%);
